productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Blue Sling Bag
description: Deviating from the label's standard leatherette trend, Linos Perros comes up with this line of distressed retro chic denim pieces for the contemporary vintage vibe. Work the 70's aesthetic with this stylish piece and style it with a worn-out denim vest or pants! Comes with a detacahle handle and shoulder strap. Height: 26 cm Width: 16 cm Denim upper with leatherette trims Mat weave details on the front Two zippered compartments with a zippered pocket in one and two pouches in the other Two buttonable pockets and a zippered pocket at the back Care Wipe with a clean, damp cloth to remove dust
